moments.author: Donald Trump
moments.quote: Micron Technology is one of the HOTTEST anywhere in the World.
moments.why: A high‑profile political endorsement that failed to stop a 10% stock plunge illustrates the limits of social media influence on markets.

moments.author: Jaylen Brown
moments.quote: I’m here with gratitude... As one chapter closes, another begins.
moments.why: Brown’s heartfelt statement on his trade from Boston to Philadelphia resonated deeply with fans and signaled a major shift in NBA offseason dynamics.

moments.author: Dawn Staley
moments.quote: Lawd…. @KingJames you about that Philly life?!! @sixers
moments.why: A playful social media nudge fueling buzz around LeBron James potentially joining Philadelphia, amplifying offseason speculation.

moments.author: Third Point (Dan Loeb)
moments.why: The billionaire hedge‑funder's one‑word tweet became a viral refrain amid crypto volatility, capturing investor sentiment.

moments.author: Chris Johnson
moments.quote: I vowed to raise awareness for ALS... relaunching the Ice Bucket Challenge.
moments.why: An emotional comeback of a viral charity challenge from a newly diagnosed former NFL star reignited broad social media support and awareness for ALS.
